since_last: 56% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.85% · BTC -3.75% · Gold -2.24% · Nasdaq100 +2.02%. 56% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.02%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.02%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.38%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.38%, MRVL +11.64%, SMCI +9.22%, INTC +8.91%, TLN +8.46%. Laggards: INOD -8.84%, SPCX -8.39%, IBM -5.71%, MDB -4.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.39% at $175.72
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.39% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
